current_suggestion.pitch: Your health channels (Attia, Saladino, Chaffee) focus on diet and exercise interventions, but Bryan Johnson is running the most obsessively measured self-experiment in longevity — tracking dozens of biomarkers continuously and publishing the actual data, which steelmans a more systems-level, protocol-driven approach to aging that none of your current channels take. He also sits at a genuine intersection of AI capability (he thinks seriously about what it means to build aligned systems) and personal philosophy around autonomy and decision-making, covering territory your channels leave untouched. Format is a mix of solo explainers and interviews, typically data-heavy and unconventional in framing.
